capabilities: Ensure reliable operation execution by combining atomic transaction patterns with software testing insights, focusing on error minimization and result validation.

procedure.action: Reconcile artifacts from agent execution and software testing by applying domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, logging operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assign results of operation execution using domain-specific tooling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true, logging operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Integrate insights from agent execution and software testing knowledge bases to ensure reliable operation execution using atomic transaction patterns.
title: Atomic Transaction Pattern for Reliable Operation Execution

failureConditions: Inconsistent operation results when merge omits error handling, causing downstream failures due to unvalidated data.
Increased error rates when validation steps are skipped, leading to unreliable operation execution and potential data corruption.
Audit trail gaps when logging is incomplete, causing difficulty in tracing operation execution and debugging issues.
